en.title: Sandy's Paradise Infinity Resort – Perissa Santorini | Pool Resort with Parking
en.description: A refined pool resort in Perissa Santorini with one of the largest pools in the area, lounge bar, continental breakfast and free parking. 10 minutes from Perissa Beach.
